textByHashes.2a225db30c260f015c617cb1bced6d7536dd1a57: We are not happy about this.
textByHashes.da5b5e3134ebd5b2eec3a548b0ebd0a227f49efa: Not much to say. Came to Weiss with other trolls when we got kicked out of caves further south, but I was just young troll then.
textByHashes.f17ad918c8adaeb0021f97e8ac6073668549734e: Mostly been enjoying living round Weiss, 'cos wildlife is interesting here.
textByHashes.14fc38ea7b131bcd8ffc882d4d56b772b5e7fa77: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.
textByHashes.f308e442830a4eda0a2f26b6f77fb4a7ce6a76c6: It great here, now Snowflake an' her husband troll taught us goutweed farming. Food so much better now.
textByHashes.5723f04b39aaece338077b4c3d7980729c855ba1: Eh, it kinda rough, but it getting better. Snowflake, she taught us goutweed farming. Goat, wolf, human all taste so much nicer with goutweed in.
textByHashes.7e0537a798ff4116912ddb9e5a17ecdb952340ac: So yeah, Weiss is good place to live, now Snowflake in charge. All trolls like Snowflake. Her husband troll kinda weird, but that not our problem.
